lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to validate the AX weapon mix, distributor draw and reinforcement fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Federal Gunship ship page — manufacturer specs, hardpoint count, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, military-slot sizing, and the module/blueprint data behind the AX loadout and engineering tables.

sources.label: Inara — Federal Gunship
sources.what: Per-ship page: base stats, hull price, Federal rank requirement, and outfitting reference for the AX fit.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Federal Gunship hull profile, seven-hardpoint layout, fighter-hangar capability, and combat-tank role notes relevant to anti-Xeno work.
